fallAlert.message: A fall-type alert has occurred. Please respond.
fallAlert.detailIntro: The table lists the alerting device, bound user, current location, and trigger time. Multiple devices may appear at once.

hero.title: A gentler control room for SmartCare staff
hero.description: Preview the upcoming React experience while the classic dashboard stays live in production.

aboutUs.title: Built by carers, for carers
aboutUs.description: Proactive Guardian Care is an FYP project from a Hong Kong team blending sensing hardware, AI fall detection, and care-team workflows so elderly residents stay safe without losing dignity.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Keep elderly residents safe with quiet, always-on sensing instead of intrusive checks.

team.title: Our team
team.description: A multidisciplinary FYP team — AI, backend, hardware, and frontend — building the platform end to end.

platform.title: Our platform
platform.description: Wearable sensing, indoor positioning, fall detection, and care workflows woven into one workspace.

whyChooseUs.title: Care that's both proactive and discreet
whyChooseUs.description: Four capabilities, one workspace — wearable safety, indoor awareness, family briefings, and a caregiver-first response loop.

fall.title: Real-time fall detection
fall.description: Wearable IMU + edge inference flags falls in seconds and routes the alert to on-shift caregivers.

position.title: Indoor positioning awareness
position.description: Floor-plan map and zone history tell you where each resident is — not just that something happened.

family.title: Family communication
family.description: Daily summaries and vitals snapshots let families stay informed without paging caregivers.

workflow.title: Caregiver-first workflows
workflow.description: Handle alerts directly from the resident view — Confirm, Resolve, or False alarm without context switching.

wellbeing.title: Wellbeing score
wellbeing.description: Average resident wellbeing taken from wearable summaries.

alertsResolved.title: Alerts resolved
alertsResolved.description: Escalations closed by the care team in the past shift.

responseTime.title: Average response time
responseTime.description: Minutes from alert raised to the first bedside check.

charts.title: Care activity snapshots
charts.subtitle: Live visual summaries of resident status, zone activity, and alerts.

zones.title: Zone occupancy
zones.subtitle: Residents grouped by last seen location.

alerts.title: Alert activity
alerts.subtitle: High-priority updates over the last 6 hours.

generated.location: Check on {{name}} around {{location}} during next rounds.

nextSteps.title: Next steps
nextSteps.mapDataGateway: Wrap DataGateway APIs with type-safe React hooks.
nextSteps.portTokens: Port visual tokens from the static dashboard into shared CSS variables.
nextSteps.addRouting: Add authenticated routing and progressively migrate real panels.

vitalsHistory.title: Vitals history
vitalsHistory.loadingBody: Checking whether the backend vitals history endpoint is ready.
vitalsHistory.emptyBody: There are no vitals readings for the selected range yet.
vitalsHistory.unavailableBody: Vitals history is not yet available. Waiting for backend update.
vitalsHistory.invalidResidentIdBody: The resident identifier must be a numeric user ID (same as user.user_id in the database). The current value cannot be used with the history API.
